title: Egor's stuff
description: Mod that adds ruby armor, magma tools and more.
body:
# Egor's stuff
No place to get armor? Not enough biomes? Not enough simple structures? Want something special? There is a solution, it is the Egor's stuff mod. This mod adds to the game: glass armor, magma tools, ruby, monochrome biome, lots of structures, heated and overheated ruby, freezers, New Year items, ideas and idea tools, idea concentrators, fusion furnaces, idea crafting tables, washing machines, leaf syntheziers, 6 new TNT blocks, idea armor, motivation effects, new "bread"(bread cake base) creation system, effect apples, fly-cakes, TNT arrows, fly generators, large fly-cakes, hyper fly-cakes, milkshakes, fridges, coffee, New Year creepers, FTB Quests (in)compatibility, experience bottle packs(9-in-1), TNT arrow launcher, 2026 april fools items and more.
## Monochrome blocks and items
A Monochrome Log is a block obtained by "cooking" a log on a campfire. This block is a monochrome version of a regular log.
Monochrome planks are a block created from a monochrome log, created in the same way as regular planks.
## Ruby item
Ruby is an item obtained by smelting emerald. Other items can be created from ruby.
## Ruby armor
Ruby armor is a set of armor made from ruby. All armor is created in the same way as normal armor, but ruby ​​is used instead of normal items.
## Ruby portal
A Ruby Portal is a portal created from ruby ​​blocks instead of obsidian blocks and activated with a special activator. This portal leads to the monochrome lands.
## Monochrome lands
Monochrome Lands is a biome where everything is monochrome. At the moment (version 1.0.4) there are no entities and only one structure - a communication tower. Sounds from the warped forest can appear in this biome, and shiny particles also appear here.
## Magma tools and armor
Magma tools and armor are tools and armor created from magma blocks.
